coupling_threshold.rationale: single co-occurrence is indistinguishable from coincidence; weights above threshold retained for effect size

observation_window.preregistered_secondary: rolling_24_month_window (sensitivity analysis; reported separately, never merged)
observation_window.rationale: fewest free parameters for the primary; window sensitivity declared now, not discovered later

rename_handling.declared_limitation: rename detection at 50% similarity is heuristic; misdetections perturb identity
rename_handling.mechanism: git log -M50 --name-status; historical paths resolved to terminal name via rename chains
rename_handling.rationale: mass renames fragment coupling history; distinct-path treatment undercounts real coupling

scoring_metric_preregistered.null_model: size-matched random partitions, 1000 draws per repository
scoring_metric_preregistered.rationale: metric choice is itself an interpretation channel; frozen before any encoder output exists
scoring_metric_preregistered.statistic: within-block co-change capture: sum of pair weights with both files in one block / total pair weight
scoring_metric_preregistered.success_mapping: capture > 95th percentile of null, per EXP-001 success condition

validity_scope.certifies: policy decisions frozen prior to P1-C encoder work
